acceptance: Approve private intake path and decision owner.
Approve minimum fields, notices, consent, complaint route.
Approve control, access, retention, export, delete.
Confirm support, pause, complaint, incident escalation.
Prove least privilege, revoke, logs, backup, restore.
Approve retention, archive, export, delete, withdrawal closeout.
Confirm guest path does not imply membership.
Confirm role and support training complete.
Provider access, if any, is contract-bound and revocable.
Decide hold, second rehearsal, limited pilot, archive, or no-go.
Archive sample package or no-go safely if approvals do not pass.
